problem id: 947a029b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  10100100 -> 01001001
  11110110 -> 11101101
  10011111 -> 00111111
  00111010 -> 01110100
  01011101 -> 10111010
  01101101 -> 11011010
  00100000 -> 01000000
  10101000 -> 01010001

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 11111101
